did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a narrative review discussing the role of AI in dermatology, not a primary study that used AI to obtain results. It summarizes existing literature and lists AI models (e.g., CNNs, ResNet, SVM) from other studies but does not perform any AI-based analysis itself.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
